steps.t: Find and speak with Hanâth at The Din of Arms in the Tor Gardens. Shemâya, a wine-merchant of Umbar Baharbêl has come to Dâr Laja to file a complaint …
Hanâth's husband is somewhere in Tâkhdar, likely in Kheb Hanût. A frantic woman is looking for her husband, who has gotten himself banned from every w…
Hanâth's husband is probably in Tâkhdar in the black market at Kheb Hanût. Search for someone who seems particularly inebriated in the cellars.
Hanâth's husband is drinking himself blind in Tâkhdar at Kheb Hanût. You have found Hanâth's husband in the cellars. You should greet him and see if h…
